messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A swarm launched from the shell never appears in the run history — only VS Code commands append to it
What it solves: THE DEFECT. `extension/src/runs/runLog.ts:appendRun`/`updateLastRunForTarget` is only ever called
by the `swarmforge.launchSwarm`/`stopSwarm`/`openPR`/`setRunMode` VS Code commands
(extension.ts:238,1339,1625,1713). But the real swarm — including the one running on this box
right now — is launched …
How it works: Launching the swarm records a run

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-352 - A swarm launched from the shell never appears in the run history — only VS Code commands append to it is complete.
